mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, course_id, chapter_id, play_second, total_study_second, create_time, update_time FROM edu_study_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_study_record (student_id, course_id, chapter_id, play_second, total_study_second, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{playSecond}, #{totalStudySecond}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_study_record SET play_second = #{playSecond}, total_study_second = #{totalStudySecond}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
